zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry De Bradbourne於1394年出生在英國德比夏爾布拉德布恩時，他的父親John De Bradbourne I34歲，母親Maud Of Blithfield29歲。他和Margery Baggott至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1457年在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩享年63歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry De Bradbourne于1394年出生在英国德比夏爾布拉德布恩时，他的父亲John De Bradbourne I34岁，母亲Maud Of Blithfield29岁。他和Margery Baggott至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1457年在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩享年63岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bradbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bradburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Bradbourne in Derbyshire or occasionally from Brabourne in Kent, both named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry De Bradbourne was born in 1394, in Bradbourne, Derbyshire, England, his father, John De Bradbourne I, was 34 and his mother, Maud Of Blithfield, was 29. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Margery Baggott. He died in 1457, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry De Bradbourne est né en 1394, à Bradbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John De Bradbourne I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maud Of Blithfield, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Margery Baggott. Il est décédé en 1457, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry De Bradbourne 1394 in Bradbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Bradbourne I 34 und seine Mutter Maud Of Blithfield 29. Er hatte mit Margery Baggott mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1457 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De Bradbourne è nato il nel 1394 nel Bradbourne, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, John De Bradbourne I, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Maud Of Blithfield, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Margery Baggott. Morì nel 1457, nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Northampton, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry De Bradbourneが1394年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアブラドボウルンで生まれた時，父John De Bradbourne Iは34歳，母Maud Of Blithfieldは29歳であった。彼はMargery Baggottとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1457年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで63歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry De Bradbourne(이)가 1394년 영국 더비실르 브라드보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Bradbourne I(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Of Blithfield(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Margery Baggott(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1457년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De Bradbourne nasceu em 1394, em Bradbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Bradbourne I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maud Of Blithfield, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Margery Baggott. Ele faleceu em 1457, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry De Bradbourne родился в 1394 г. в местности брадбурн, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени John De Bradbourne I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Of Blithfield, 29. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Margery Baggott. Он умер в 1457 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry De Bradbourne nació en 1394, en Bradbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Bradbourne I, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Maud Of Blithfield, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Margery Baggott. Murió en 1457, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
